mapper.sql: id, traffic_id, attack_type, risk_level, confidence, rule_id, rule_content, source_ip, target_uri, attack_content, handled, handle_time, handle_remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_attack_monitor WHERE handled = 0 AND risk_level = 'HIGH' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT attack_type AS attackType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_monitor GROUP BY attack_type
SELECT risk_level AS riskLevel, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_monitor GROUP BY risk_level
SELECT source_ip AS sourceIp, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_monitor GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT target_uri AS targetUri, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_monitor GROUP BY target_uri ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS time, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_attack_monitor WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') ORDER BY time ASC
